name: @senjinthedragon/sillytavern-discord-connector
description: Full-featured Discord bridge for SillyTavern with image support and slash commands.

scripts.version: cd server && npm install && cd .. && version-everything manifest.json server/package.json && git add manifest.json server/package.json package-lock.json server/package-lock.json
scripts.bump: npm version patch && git push origin HEAD --tags
scripts.bump-minor: npm version minor && git push origin HEAD --tags
scripts.bump-major: npm version major && git push origin HEAD --tags

author: Senjin the Dragon <https://github.com/senjinthedragon>
